sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n31785" key="e)kbu/rswma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐκβύρσ-ωμα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n31785.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">projecting of the bones out of the skin,</tr_> ib.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">714</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
